header.subtitle: CAREERS
header.title: Build what matters. Ship what scales.
header.description: We're a team of engineers, designers, and product thinkers who believe great software changes everything. If you're passionate about clean code, scalable systems, and solving hard problems — we want to hear from you.

items.title: Ship Fast, Ship Right
items.desc: We move quickly without cutting corners. CI/CD, code reviews, and automated testing are non-negotiable.

items.title: Own the Outcome
items.desc: Every engineer owns their feature end-to-end — from architecture to deployment to monitoring.

items.title: Stay Curious
items.desc: We invest in R&D time, conference talks, and open-source contributions. Learning never stops.

items.title: Build for Scale
items.desc: We design systems to handle 10x growth from day one. Performance and reliability are first-class citizens.

items.title: Top-tier Equipment
items.desc: MacBook Pro, 4K monitors, and all the tools you need

items.title: Learning Budget
items.desc: Annual stipend for courses, conferences, and certifications

items.title: Remote-first
items.desc: Work from anywhere — we're distributed by default

items.title: Equity & Bonuses
items.desc: Competitive comp with stock options for early joiners

items.title: Career Growth
items.desc: Clear IC and management tracks with mentorship

items.title: Team Retreats
items.desc: Annual off-sites to connect and recharge

sections.subtitle: Are you a student or recent grad? Apply below to kickstart your career by building real AI products under senior mentorship.

jobs.title: AI / ML Intern
jobs.desc: Work on real AI agent pipelines, LLM integrations, and prompt engineering under senior mentorship.

sections.subtitle: Are you an experienced professional? We do not hire full-time employees. Instead, we partner with elite freelancers for project-based contracts. Send your CV/Portfolio to join our network.

jobs.title: AI Solutions Architect
jobs.desc: Partner with us on a project basis to design end-to-end AI solutions, generative AI integrations, and custom ML models.

jobs.title: AI Agent Orchestrator
jobs.desc: Take on specialized freelance contracts building multi-agent AI systems, voice agents, and lead scraping bots.

jobs.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
jobs.desc: Join our network for high-impact web development projects across React, Node.js, and headless CMS platforms.

jobs.title: Mobile App Developer (Flutter/Native)
jobs.desc: Freelance opportunities to build scalable iOS and Android applications for our enterprise clients.

jobs.title: Cloud & DevOps Engineer
jobs.desc: Architect and manage AWS/GCP infrastructure, Kubernetes clusters, and automated CI/CD pipelines.

jobs.title: Data Engineer / Analyst
jobs.desc: Design scalable data pipelines, ETL workflows, and real-time Power BI/Tableau dashboards.

jobs.title: UI/UX & Brand Designer
jobs.desc: Craft premium user interfaces in Figma, conduct user research, and build comprehensive brand identity systems.

jobs.title: Motion Graphics & 3D Artist
jobs.desc: Create stunning product demos, Lottie animations, and 3D architectural renders for modern web platforms.

jobs.title: SEO & Growth Strategist
jobs.desc: Drive digital growth through Technical SEO, Generative Engine Optimization, and paid ad campaigns.

jobs.title: Technical Content Copywriter
jobs.desc: Write high-converting SaaS copy, SEO blog strategies, and thought leadership articles for tech brands.

jobs.title: Enterprise CRM/ERP Specialist
jobs.desc: Consult and implement custom CRM systems, Salesforce/HubSpot migrations, and supply chain ERPs.

jobs.title: Cybersecurity & Compliance Consultant
jobs.desc: Conduct penetration testing and guide clients through SOC 2, HIPAA, and GDPR compliance audits.

jobs.title: App Store Publishing & Compliance Expert
jobs.desc: Manage end-to-end publishing, ASO, and strict compliance for iOS, Android, and Windows apps across all business categories (Fintech, Health, E-commerce).
